creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, sorry but 6.0 is no longer supported, please update to 6.2 and 
check whether the problem still exists there. In case it does and you 
have a patch, ONLY submit the patch (not the entire file please) so that 
we can easily review it and make sure it gets committed if it is good 
:-). I will close the ticket for now.
